creator: jarrod@netleader.com.au
text:
The last official releases of both Nagios 1.x and NRPE 1.x were back in 2004,
neither of which are now supported by the author.

Most, if not all users have migrated to newer, stable versions of both ports
where similar functionality exists.  Mark ports as deprecated and schedule for
removal in four weeks.  Also, assume control of net-mgmt/nrpe, only to have it
slated for removal ;-)

Files modified:
ports/net-mgmt/nagios12
ports/net-mgmt/nrpe

Fix: Downloadable diff from:
http://www.netleader.com.au/~jarrod/FreeBSD/net-mgmt-nagios12-expiration.diff
